titleStmt.title: SII 9.711: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 711. (A.R. No. 30 of 1904.) ON THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT AMBALI, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Parīdhāvi, Āśvayuja (not verifiable). It registers the grant of 400 kambas of land at Kōgaḷi for the service of the god Kalidēva in Ammeḷe by the Kādamba chief Jagadaḷa-Pāṇḍya. The whole of the record is in Kannaḍa verse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . toḷapeḷaveṟekeṁjeḍeyoḷpaḷaccaniralalli baḷase gaṁgānadi kaṇgoḷisuva kalidēvē
śaṁ sale jagadaḷapāṁḍyanaipatigīgabhimatamaṁ . vai . Aṁbujasaṁbhavaṁ padedu puṭṭida kṛṣṇana nābhipadmadaṁteṁbudu caṁdrakaustubhabhavōjvaḷadugdhapayōnidhānadeṁteṁ
budu mecci mecci paribhāvisi bhāvisi dhātri kūrttu kādaṁbakulōdbhavāgraṇi jagaddaḷapāṁḍyanaipāḷavaṁśavaṁ . Ā bhuvanavinutakuladoḷbhūbhuvanavanoṁde tōḷo
ḷorbbane kēyūrābharaṇadaṁte taḷedaṁ bhūbhaitkuḷatiḷakanenisi jagadaḷapāṁḍyaṁ . Eḷeyoḷvikhyātivettaṁmeḷeyoḷparidhābyabdadāśvaijadoḷ śrī kalidēvarggi
ttanānaṁdade jagadaḷapāṁḍyōrvvipaṁ gaddeyaṁ kōgaḷiyoḷnālnūṟu kaṁbasthaḷavaneseva kādaṁbavaṁśāgragaṇyaṁ nelanuṁ caṁdrārkkaruḷḷaṁnevaravatibaḷaṁ bhāgyavaṁ
taṁ mahaṁtaṁ . naḷanahuṣasagarakhēcaradilīpapuruputsakārttavīryyārjjanaroṁdaḷavaḷavārppārppu jagaddaḷapāṁḍyanṛpāḷaneṁbudavanī cakraṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Īdharmakkanuvarttigaḷī dhare caṁdrārkkaruḷḷinaṁsukhigaḷmattīdharmmavidēkeṁbarivar caṁdrārkkaruḷḷinaṁ pāpiṣṭharu © padakada makuṭada kēyūrada kelasadoḷakkasāli basavō
jasutaṁ caduraṁ kētōjaṁ mattideṁtu kaṁḍarisi kaḍadanī śāsanamaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.711 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
